items.name: Quilly
items.description: Quilly turns your voice into text —  Press a hotkey, speak naturally, press to stop. Optionally, a small on-device LLM polishes the result - grammar, reformatting, translating, and more. The final text pastes automatically into whatever app you were using.  Everything happens on your machine. No cloud, no account, no data ever leaves your device.
